career: Venus-Saturn blends refinement with duty. It favors long-term contracts, structured creative work, architecture, real estate, law, governance, operations, and mature partnerships.
relationships: Commitment, responsibility, distance, age difference, duty, or karmic testing may define relationships. Stable bonds deepen through patience.
wealth: Wealth grows slowly through discipline, assets, savings, land, institutional work, and persistent effort. Luxury spending may need restraint.
caution: Emotional coldness, delay, fatigue, and relationship pressure should be handled with consistency rather than avoidance.
